settings.custom_liquid:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
  <path d="M12 5.5c-2 -2 -5 -2.5 -7 -1 -2.5 2 -2.5 6 0 10 1.5 2.5 5 5 7 6.5 2 -1.5 5.5 -4 7 -6.5 2.5 -4 2.5 -8 0 -10 -2 -1.5 -5 -1 -7 1z"/>
  <path d="M9 11.5c0.8 0.8 2.2 0.8 3 0"/>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="30" height="28" viewBox="0 0 30 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
  <!-- cargo box -->
  <rect x="1.5" y="5" width="14" height="11" rx="1.5"/>
  <!-- cab: hood slopes down from top of box to bonnet -->
  <path d="M15.5 7 h6 l4 4 v5 h-10 z"/>
  <!-- windshield divider -->
  <line x1="20" y1="7" x2="20" y2="11"/>
  <line x1="15.5" y1="11" x2="25.5" y2="11"/>
  <!-- wheels -->
  <circle cx="6" cy="18" r="2.2"/>
  <circle cx="21" cy="18" r="2.2"/>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
  <path d="M12 2l8 3v6c0 5 -3.5 9 -8 11 -4.5 -2 -8 -6 -8 -11V5z"/>
  <path d="M9 12l2 2 4 -4"/>
</svg>
